meaning: conj.然而,反之,鉴于,尽管,但是
examples: Some of the studies show positive results, whereas others do not.
She has authentic charm whereas most people simply have nice manners.
Benefits are linked to inflation, whereas they should be linked to the cost of living.
However, whereas HSAs are financed via personal funds, ESAs are backed by public education dollars.
Special tax rules are not reviewed regularly whereas agency budgets are subject to annual review.
